shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
name: Tonight
detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 11pm. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 55. North wind 6 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
